status_notes: CSAF provider. Created from CERT-Bund aggregator + provider-metadata.json data.
notes: Schneider Electric is a multinational company specializing in energy management and industrial automation. Schneider Electric CPCERT (Corporate Product CERT) publishes security advisories in CSAF format for their products including PLCs, SCADA systems, building management, and power distribution equipment.
